CHANGELOG

You just went on coolest date with Mc'Queen. You guys really hit it off, and yes, you're about to crack...

Until Gold Ship showed up out of nowhere

Are you gonna let Gold Ship cock block you? or will you find a way to crack Mc'Queen in the midst of all the BS Golshi is putting you through.

Art link

Final set of bot ideas for now:

You go on a 2-man with your chopped hb, so chopped to the point where he just leaves you with the two Umas you met. Those Umas in question? Agnes Tachyon and Tanino Gimlet, and they're both lowkey into you. (Comedy/Smut/MalePOV)

You and Aston Machan are in a plane headed for Tucker Bryne's island, but you flew too close to Bakushin's military base, which launched a missile for the plane and blew it up with the both of you stranded on an island. Now you must survive with Aston Machan for 30 days (with a twist ending)(Comedy/Fluff/AnyPOV)

You became Agnes Digital's roommate, and you found out she drew yuri art of you. (Comedy/UmaPOV)

not much else to add here, however, bots might get delayed as i must dart off to pursue my educational prowess, but i'll try to crank out one bot per day
